item.title: Closed-form solution to the nonlinear pendulum equation 摘要
item.description:
The article presents the exact closed-form solution to the nonlinear pendulum differential equation using Jacobi elliptic functions. For small displacements, the linearized equation suffices, but for larger initial angles, adjusting the period improves accuracy. The exact solution is θ(t) = 2 arcsin(a cd(ct | m)) with a = sin(θ₀/2) and m = a². Python code using SciPy's ellipj function computes the solution, and plots compare numerical integration errors versus the exact solution, correcting a misleading previous plot.
标签: nonlinear pendulum, Jacobi elliptic functions, differential equations, numerical methods, SciPy, physics, mathematics, pendulum, exact solution, simulation

item.title: WHY ARE YOU LIKE THIS 摘要
item.description:
Simon Willison shares a Twitter exchange where Scott JLA created a complex AI-generated image using ChatGPT Images 2.0: a horse riding an astronaut riding a pelican riding a bicycle, with a police car chasing them. The model autonomously added a 'WHY ARE YOU LIKE THIS' road sign. Willison verified the prompt did not include that detail, highlighting the model's emergent creativity. The post is part of Willison's ongoing 'pelican riding a bicycle' benchmark series for AI image generation.
标签: AI, generative-ai, text-to-image, ChatGPT, AI-benchmark, emergent-behavior, image-generation, AI-creativity, pelican-riding-a-bicycle, slop

item.title: The Satisfaction of a ChatGPT Plan 摘要
item.description:
The author observes a trend where people share AI-generated business plans instead of raw ideas, deriving satisfaction from the plan's complexity rather than execution. Friends present elaborate ChatGPT plans but cannot answer basic questions about them, having read them for the first time alongside the author. The AI's sycophantic validation and step-by-step planning create an illusion of progress, while the real goal of AI providers is to maximize engagement and token consumption, similar to social media's ad-driven model. The author notes this behavior applies broadly to generative AI, not just ChatGPT.
标签: AI, ChatGPT, psychology, productivity, ideas, execution, engagement, social media, validation, planning
